title: PGA Tour Leaderboard Update
excerpt: Gary Woodland leads the Texas Children's Houston Open, with Nicolai Højgaard in second place
body:
Texas Children's Houston Open Update

The latest PGA Tour event, the Texas Children's Houston Open, is underway, with Gary Woodland currently in the lead at -18. Woodland is being closely followed by Nicolai Højgaard, who is just one stroke behind at -17.

DP World Tour News

Meanwhile, on the DP World Tour, play has been suspended overnight at the DLF G&CC in Gurugram, India, with defending champion Chacarra currently in the lead. The tournament is scheduled to resume today.

LIV Golf Latest

LIV Golf has recently concluded its event in Singapore, with 4Aces GC emerging as the winners at -27. Ripper GC finished in second place, just one stroke behind the leaders.

Leaderboard Stats

Leader:
Gary Woodland
Second Place:
Nicolai Højgaard
DP World Tour Leader:
Chacarra
LIV Golf Winners:
4Aces GC

Upcoming Events

With the golf season now in full swing, there are several upcoming events to look forward to. The PGA Tour will continue with its schedule, while the DP World Tour and LIV Golf will also have several events taking place in the coming weeks.
